glosses.ja: 感心する; 敬服する

translations.en: I admire this painting at the museum.
translations.es: Admiro este cuadro en el museo.
translations.de: Ich bewundere dieses Gemälde im Museum.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在博物馆欣赏这幅画。
translations.yue: 我喺博物館欣賞呢幅畫。
translations.ru: Я любуюсь этой картиной в музее.
translations.pt: Eu admiro esta pintura no museu.
translations.vi: Tôi chiêm ngưỡng bức tranh này ở bảo tàng.
translations.ar: أنا أتأمل هذه اللوحة في المتحف.
translations.nl: Ik bewonder dit schilderij in het museum.
translations.uk: Я милуюся цією картиною в музеї.
translations.hu: A múzeumban megcsodálom ezt a festményt.
translations.hi: मैं संग्रहालय में इस पेंटिंग की प्रशंसा करता हूँ.
translations.el: Θαυμάζω αυτόν τον πίνακα στο μουσείο.
translations.nb: Jeg beundrer dette maleriet på museet.
translations.id: Saya mengagumi lukisan ini di museum.
translations.sv: Jag beundrar den här tavlan på museet.
translations.da: Jeg beundrer dette maleri på museet.
translations.ja: 私は美術館でこの絵を鑑賞します。

tokens.explanation: Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; includes elided clitic subject pronoun ‘je’ as ‘j’ attached to the verb.
Demonstrative determiner modifying ‘tableau’, indicating a specific item.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘J’admire’.
Contraction of preposition ‘à’ + definite article ‘le’; introduces a locative complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘au’, marking the location.

sentences.target: Ils admirent le coucher de soleil.

translations.fr: Ils admirent le coucher de soleil.
translations.es: Ellos admiran la puesta de sol.
translations.pt: Eles admiram o pôr do sol.
translations.hi: वे सूर्यास्त की प्रशंसा करते हैं.
translations.ja: 彼らは夕日を眺めます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural; subject of the verb ‘admirent’.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person plural.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines ‘coucher’.
Deverbal common noun (‘le coucher de soleil’ = sunset); head of the noun phrase and direct object of ‘admirent’.
Preposition linking ‘coucher’ to its complement ‘soleil’ (of-phrase).
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of the preposition ‘de’.

sentences.target: Elle aime admirer les fleurs du jardin.
sentences.reading: /ɛl ɛm ad.mi.ʁe le flœʁ dy ʒaʁ.dɛ̃/

translations.fr: Elle aime admirer les fleurs du jardin.
translations.ipa: /ɛl ɛm ad.mi.ʁe le flœʁ dy ʒaʁ.dɛ̃/
translations.en: She likes to admire the garden flowers.
translations.es: A ella le gusta admirar las flores del jardín.
translations.de: Sie liebt es, die Blumen im Garten zu bewundern.
translations.it: Lei ama ammirare i fiori del giardino.
translations.ko: 그녀는 정원 꽃을 감상하는 것을 좋아합니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 她喜欢欣赏花园里的花。
translations.pt: Ela gosta de admirar as flores do jardim.
translations.tr: O, bahçedeki çiçekleri hayranlıkla seyretmeyi sever.
translations.vi: Cô ấy thích ngắm hoa trong vườn.
translations.nl: Zij houdt ervan de bloemen in de tuin te bewonderen.
translations.uk: Вона любить милуватися квітами в саду.
translations.hu: Ő a kert virágaiban szeret gyönyörködni.
translations.hi: वह बगीचे के फूलों की प्रशंसा करना पसंद करती है.
translations.pl: Ona lubi podziwiać kwiaty w ogrodzie.
translations.el: Εκείνη αγαπά να θαυμάζει τα λουλούδια στον κήπο.
translations.nb: Hun liker å beundre blomstene i hagen.
translations.id: Dia suka mengagumi bunga-bunga di taman.
translations.sv: Hon gillar att beundra blommorna i trädgården.
translations.ro: Ea iubește să admire florile din grădină.
translations.cs: Ona ráda obdivuje květiny na zahradě.
translations.da: Hun kan lide at beundre blomsterne i haven.
translations.ja: 彼女は庭の花を鑑賞するのが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular; subject of ‘aime’.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Infinitive verb functioning as a complement (object) of ‘aime’.
Definite article, plural; determines ‘fleurs’.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of the infinitive ‘admirer’.
Contraction of preposition ‘de’ + definite article ‘le’; introduces a genitive/possessive complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of the preposition ‘du’.

sentences.target: Nous admirons la vue depuis le balcon.
sentences.reading: /nu ad.mi.ʁɔ̃ la vy də.pɥi lə bal.kɔ̃/

translations.fr: Nous admirons la vue depuis le balcon.
translations.ipa: /nu ad.mi.ʁɔ̃ la vy də.pɥi lə bal.kɔ̃/
translations.en: We admire the view from the balcony.
translations.es: Admiramos la vista desde el balcón.
translations.de: Wir bewundern die Aussicht vom Balkon.
translations.pt: Nós admiramos a vista da varanda.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi ngắm cảnh từ ban công.
translations.nl: Wij bewonderen het uitzicht vanaf het balkon.
translations.hu: Mi a kilátásban gyönyörködünk a balkonról.
translations.hi: हम बालकनी से दृश्य की प्रशंसा करते हैं.
translations.el: Θαυμάζουμε τη θέα από το μπαλκόνι.
translations.ja: 私たちはバルコニーから景色を眺めます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of ‘admirons’.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person plural.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines ‘vue’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘admirons’.
Preposition introducing the viewpoint/location; heads the prepositional phrase ‘depuis le balcon’.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines ‘balcon’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘depuis’.
